action.reasoning: Observation: Iter17 trained 5 epochs/task sequential + 150 joint epochs, achieving best joint val_acc 0.768. Previous best test accuracy was 0.7449 with 30 epochs/task (no joint). Analysis: Joint training should improve test accuracy, potentially exceeding 0.7449. Decision: Submit eval with best.pt to measure gain, then decide next steps (increase joint epochs, try stronger backbone, etc.) based on result.
